description_long: This object is a sleek, dark-colored sword with a straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade appears to be made of metal, exhibiting a glossy, reflective surface. The crossguard is simple and straight, providing protection for the hand, and is also dark in color, matching the blade. The handle is straight and faceted, ending in a hexagonal pommel, and seems to be constructed from the same material as the blade and guard. There are no visible engravings, patterns, or decorative elements on any part of the sword, giving it a utilitarian and modern appearance. The overall design is minimalistic, with clean lines and a uniform finish.
description: A sleek, dark, double-edged sword with a straight blade, simple crossguard, and faceted handle, all in a glossy finish. The design is minimalistic and modern, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight, double-edged blade, crossguard, and faceted handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle and pommel.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the blade's thin profile and the handle's straight geometry.
attribute_handle_design: straight, faceted, dark, hexagonal pommel, smooth surface
